title: SNDL (SNDL) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: The company reported an all-time record gross margin of 25.5% with notable improvements across multiple metrics. Net revenue reached $228.1 million, down 1.6% year-over-year, though cannabis operations grew 9.2%. Cannabis operations achieved positive gross profit for the second consecutive quarter. Gross profit increased 12% year-over-year to $58.2 million. Free cash flow and adjusted operating income both improved approximately 70-82% compared to the prior year. Management announced plans to reduce corporate overhead by more than $20 million with implementation beginning in Q3 2024. Speakers included Zach George, Chief Executive Officer, and Alberto Paradero, Chief Financial Officer. All financial figures discussed are in Canadian dollars unless otherwise specified.
